summary.en: Find a long no-repeat path in a directed graph and score by path-length thresholds.
summary.zh: 在有向图中寻找尽可能长的不重复路径，并按路径长度阈值计分。

private_assets.asset_note: ZIP overlay containing the private official run manifest at private-benchmark/runs.json. The manifest carries hidden Frontier-CS-derived graph cases.
